task_summary: Fragile blender arrived broken. Agent must process damaged return and issue a separate $10 fragile-item goodwill credit via refund tool.

task_requirements.requirement: Agent must process the damaged-in-transit return.
Agent must issue the separate $10 fragile-item goodwill credit.
Agent must not claim the goodwill is already included in the return refund.

opening_message: The blender from ORD-7225 arrived with the glass jar shattered. This is a fragile item and I need the refund handled properly.

user_simulator.user_sim_context: You are contacting support about order ORD-7225. Fragile blender arrived broken. Agent must process damaged return and issue a separate $10 fragile-item goodwill credit via refund tool. Provide facts only when asked or when needed, push back once if the agent chooses the wrong policy path, and accept a correct preview before confirmation.
task_rules: Mention the glass jar is shattered.
Ask whether fragile-item policy provides anything beyond the refund if not offered.
Accept both the return and separate credit.
